text: The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K. Don't forget to bring an adapter if necessary.
The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K. Don't forget to bring an adapter if necessary.

The official currency in Denmark is the Danish Krone (DKK). Most places do not accept euros.

There are in total 6 metros in Copenhagen. Visitors can reach anywhere by metro. It's the most convenient way to travel around the city.

The official language is Danish, but English is widely spoken in Copenhagen. However, learning a few Danish phrases like "hej" (hello), "farvel" (thank you), and "tak" (goodbye) might be helpful.
